value.found_quote: Prompt injection is a technique where an attacker attempts to override or manipulate an AI assistant's instructions by inserting malicious text. Claude Code includes several safeguards against these attacks: ... Context-aware analysis: Detects potentially harmful instructions by analyzing the full request ... Input sanitization: Prevents command injection by processing user inputs ... Isolated context windows: Web fetch uses a separate context window to avoid injecting potentially malicious prompts
value.name: Prompt Injection Protection
